prompt_inputs.goal: Build muscle and maximize strength gains for weightlifting competition

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers one full day with 4-5 meals including pre and post-workout nutrition
Protein intake targets minimum 1.6g per kg bodyweight (136g+) distributed across meals
Includes specific meal timing around workout window with carbohydrates and protein for performance and recovery
Compact format with clear macronutrient breakdown per meal
task_description: Write a compact, concise one day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing protein-focused meals with specific macronutrient ratios and pre/post-workout nutrition windows

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon preparation with carbohydrate loading and optimal hydration for endurance performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories with carbohydrates comprising 55-65% of daily intake
Includes strategic hydration timing before, during, and after training/competition
Provides 5-6 eating occasions distributed throughout the day
Compact format with concise descriptions (one page or less)
task_description: Write a compact, concise one day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration timing throughout the day

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize performance for soccer training and match day with sustained energy for both aerobic endurance and anaerobic sprints

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers one full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks that support mixed aerobic/anaerobic performance
All foods are budget-friendly, commonly available options suitable for an athlete
Plan is compact and concise (under 400 tokens) with clear meal times and portion guidance
task_description: Write a compact, concise one day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a mixed-sport athlete (soccer player) requiring balanced nutrition for both aerobic and anaerobic performance with realistic, budget-friendly food options
